textByHash.52f8f4375f3c707c02af6257b10a8731e36115bc: No, you rock brain! Humans are our friends!
textByHash.ffaaae8a018d68cb25ce557d78ebed7fe85e7e67: Or were you just stopping by for a chat?
textByHash.534dc58fdc187e8572dfc356b3d6eec8d839865f: Oh no, we can't do that.
textByHash.4fd706b24a479c3fc4b1562fe1cce75bc9d7e428: Always keep busy, is what our good father used to say.
textByHash.0ceb9340655abf5148e18cd121a986a6afb5bb92: Don't tell him that! None of his business!
textByHash.c28657fd2c13cca0dee3a993dfa426b61c2c82da: Don't tell her that! None of his business!
textByHash.c04fb381627918cba5054b02edee39db8e17b244: Don't tell him that! None of her business!
textByHash.a210bad3129abbcb80861f493ddda174a90b5e29: Don't tell her that! None of her business!
textByHash.10369f31582ffc1c07561234177f3f6cbb278ed0: That must be why you were talking about fish then...
textByHash.81e9ce8be09e5ffff8c04a8a26d4982502df6106: But this water here, you see, it comes dripping down from above.
textByHash.74d44f008598118dd1db11cf92eb6ba3cc033d62: Oh, they're these small wriggly things that live in the water.
textByHash.2ba193c434c9984c12604b918542aa9a67ae18f0: Oh, they all have their headquarters in the city.
textByHash.99ff90b37d0469cf28df9941aeadeecf49f44bd0: No need to give him directions.
textByHash.faf3590ab5a9299f684b8fffcdcd9cce8f4893d5: No need to give her directions.
textByHash.5e53e0446086cdcbdfae19eb1b647d8e31c69132: But because the river goes right to the city, this is just as easy.
textByHash.233dc063a6be48d5caeebae7c574c0784e0b5e4d: That's what he said, isn't? Pay more attention!
textByHash.fb08bde2026c8e90ec33f8835dbc9dde681e373f: That's what she said, isn't? Pay more attention!
textByHash.9d51c19e14425d2020a70b353a851d215ae070e4: How long would you say he's been there, Miotvednir?
textByHash.64323ddfe7d9ec64d30a118b54313e5c501d2606: But look at what it got him.
textByHash.f803f73c6bad69674f300eddd456fb8261295cff: Don't you think that's the first thing they tried?
textByHash.2edd51fd51d565cf0194ac0348e602f59348f10d: Oh, stop winding up the human, Dernu!
textByHash.7e59eece2ecd4860c54737740db0779beac03fd1: Old Dondakan might have finally lost it.
textByHash.63c3bc51736a00e33429b094a5ea3fc4ef22987c: Don't be such a coward, Dernu!
textByHash.388294cd7facd5a94c102967296172d347122752: I don't know, I've never encountered an evil demon.
textByHash.9c179bc4bf68ab48a94a7f355c0de4fdb8464448: I think you must have had too much dwarven stout in you.
textByHash.6a9979b591c0bad2de6f30ea4e237a18df04b25a: Pay attention for once, Dernu! It's Dondakan's rock!
textByHash.c921eec830f6109232bf43220a66591122ddc4e2: What kind of question is that to ask? With his great might of course!
textByHash.cad89ee52e73405bab2ce01c07afb0c9ed2c70c3: What kind of question is that to ask? With her great might of course!
textByHash.286a05a554939c1506049fbeb90cd85c5367fcdf: What kind of question is that to ask? With their great might of course!
textByHash.e638f98e5f50e967349ac84419f9308feeaa934b: Anyway, this calls for a celebration.
textByHash.99a7ace5df7ff0ae1eca009a9bc7f8817c75698b: Right... and I'm sure traffic here will pick up soon with that rock broken.
textByHash.b1eac4e7f6066001f9735c4e80861491812ea35f: Now don't you go and discuss company business in front of this human, Dernu.
textByHash.e7e1d9a9916ae5b247e539b648118a64c296e016: It was knocked down, remember? Parts of it nearly landed on our heads?
textByHash.b96cbcb45685e0d0c0955a6b5c87e93391c019fd: My, you're certainly moving up in the dwarven world, aren't you?
textByHash.5f9c24413e2878efa478990039fd4f750756b74b: Of course, really! Player wouldn't have said it otherwise, would he?
textByHash.a1b707b0d392398472bbde59c90c6976ef7891c1: Of course, really! Player wouldn't have said it otherwise, would she?
textByHash.988f89db320727c94fff9d1a16a3a1ee902e2715: Of course, really! Player wouldn't have said it otherwise, would they?
textByHash.b4ea7f62c7eb2ef315337072b720e2ede38c51a0: That must have been a huge task.
textByHash.f7bb468c88a56b5221000c82b0f74468b828464f: We can all take an example to his hard work and dedication.
textByHash.6e9dd19e0dea119ad7575b80cd5eae24475bd72e: Such a sad case, poor fellow.
textByHash.0f87bb91c411ac0781ec18a945865dbecf0a94f5: I suppose you're right. Well, he's a drunk dwarf that talks about kebabs a lot.
textByHash.e5e0834307540469ae3ca08d132a756e071e15df: Player wants to tell a tale!
textByHash.0efbc8f36f36b16c760bf940de110ace415980e3: Must have been pretty forgettable as well then.
